message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class SettingBase {
    + int pkgFlags
    + int pkgPrivateFlags
}

class PackageSettingBase {
    - String name
    # String realName
    # File codePath
    # String codePathString
    # File resourcePath
    # String resourcePathString
    # String[] usesStaticLibraries
    # long[] usesStaticLibrariesVersions
    # String legacyNativeLibraryPathString
    ~ String primaryCpuAbiString
    ~ String secondaryCpuAbiString
    # String cpuAbiOverrideString
    # long timeStamp
    # long firstInstallTime
    # long lastUpdateTime
    # long versionCode
    # boolean uidError
    # PackageSignatures signatures
    # boolean installPermissionsFixed
}

PackageSetting <|-- PackageSettingBase : extends
PackageSettingBase --|> SettingBase : implements

package "android.content.pm" <<Folder>> {
    [AndroidPackage] as AndroidPackage
    [SharedUserSetting] as SharedUserSetting
    [Map<String, ArraySet<String>>> mimeGroups] as MimeGroupType
    [PackageStateUnserialized] as PkgStateClass
    
    note right of AndroidPackage::pkg\n~ AndroidPackage pkg :: Represents an installed package in the system.\nIt contains metadata about applications such as permissions,\nsignature information, component declarations etc.. This object holds all necessary details required by PackageManagerService during runtime operations like installation or uninstallation processes."#lightblue"; endnote; 
}


@enduml
